\tzpentry{ID5573}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5573 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \dot{\phi}_i \;=\; \Omega_i \;+\; \sum_{\substack{j=1 \\ j\neq i}}^N K_{ij}\,\sin(\phi_j - \phi_i)\,, \qquad i=1,\dots,N~. \tag{2}\]
